speaker: DESDEMONA
text: Do you know, sirrah, where Lieutenant

speaker: DESDEMONA
text: Cassio lies?

speaker: CLOWN
text: I dare not say he lies anywhere.

speaker: DESDEMONA
text: Why, man?

speaker: CLOWN
text: He’s a soldier, and for me to say a soldier lies,

speaker: CLOWN
text: ’tis stabbing.

speaker: DESDEMONA
text: Go to! Where lodges he?

speaker: CLOWN
text: To tell you where he lodges is to tell you

speaker: CLOWN
text: where I lie.

speaker: DESDEMONA
text: Can anything be made of this?

speaker: CLOWN
text: I know not where he lodges; and for me to

speaker: CLOWN
text: devise a lodging and say he lies here, or he lies

speaker: CLOWN
text: there, were to lie in mine own throat.

speaker: DESDEMONA
text: Can you inquire him out, and be edified

speaker: DESDEMONA
text: by report?

speaker: CLOWN
text: I will catechize the world for him—that is,

speaker: CLOWN
text: make questions, and by them answer.

speaker: DESDEMONA
text: Seek him, bid him come hither. Tell him I

speaker: DESDEMONA
text: have moved my lord on his behalf and hope all will

speaker: DESDEMONA
text: be well.

speaker: CLOWN
text: To do this is within the compass of man’s wit,

speaker: CLOWN
text: and therefore I will attempt the doing it.

speaker: DESDEMONA
text: Where should I lose that handkerchief, Emilia?

speaker: EMILIA
text: I know not, madam.

speaker: DESDEMONA
text: Believe me, I had rather have lost my purse

speaker: DESDEMONA
text: Full of crusadoes. And but my noble Moor

speaker: DESDEMONA
text: Is true of mind and made of no such baseness

speaker: DESDEMONA
text: As jealous creatures are, it were enough

speaker: DESDEMONA
text: To put him to ill thinking.

speaker: EMILIA
text: Is he not jealous?

speaker: DESDEMONA
text: Who, he? I think the sun where he was born

speaker: DESDEMONA
text: Drew all such humors from him.

speaker: EMILIA
text: Look where he comes.

speaker: DESDEMONA
text: I will not leave him now till Cassio

speaker: DESDEMONA
text: Be called to him.—How is ’t with you, my lord?

speaker: OTHELLO
text:
Well, my good lady.
                 
                Aside
                .
               O, hardness to dissemble!—

speaker: OTHELLO
text: How do you, Desdemona?

speaker: DESDEMONA
text: Well, my good lord.

speaker: OTHELLO
text:
Give me your hand.
                 
                He
                 
                takes
                 
                her
                 
                hand
                .
               This hand is moist, my lady.

speaker: DESDEMONA
text: It yet has felt no age nor known no sorrow.

speaker: OTHELLO
text: This argues fruitfulness and liberal heart.

speaker: OTHELLO
text: Hot, hot, and moist. This hand of yours requires

speaker: OTHELLO
text: A sequester from liberty, fasting and prayer,

speaker: OTHELLO
text: Much castigation, exercise devout;

speaker: OTHELLO
text: For here’s a young and sweating devil here

speaker: OTHELLO
text: That commonly rebels. ’Tis a good hand,

speaker: OTHELLO
text: A frank one.

speaker: DESDEMONA
text: You may indeed say so,

speaker: DESDEMONA
text: For ’twas that hand that gave away my heart.

speaker: OTHELLO
text: A liberal hand! The hearts of old gave hands,

speaker: OTHELLO
text: But our new heraldry is hands, not hearts.

speaker: DESDEMONA
text: I cannot speak of this. Come now, your promise.

speaker: OTHELLO
text: What promise, chuck?

speaker: DESDEMONA
text: I have sent to bid Cassio come speak with you.

speaker: OTHELLO
text: I have a salt and sorry rheum offends me.

speaker: OTHELLO
text: Lend me thy handkerchief.

speaker: DESDEMONA
text: Here, my lord.

speaker: OTHELLO
text: That which I gave you.

speaker: DESDEMONA
text: I have it not about me.

speaker: OTHELLO
text: Not?

speaker: DESDEMONA
text: No, faith, my lord.

speaker: OTHELLO
text: That’s a fault. That handkerchief

speaker: OTHELLO
text: Did an Egyptian to my mother give.

speaker: OTHELLO
text: She was a charmer, and could almost read

speaker: OTHELLO
text: The thoughts of people. She told her, while she kept it,

speaker: OTHELLO
text: ’Twould make her amiable and subdue my father

speaker: OTHELLO
text: Entirely to her love. But if she lost it,

speaker: OTHELLO
text: Or made a gift of it, my father’s eye

speaker: OTHELLO
text: Should hold her loathèd, and his spirits should hunt

speaker: OTHELLO
text: After new fancies. She, dying, gave it me,

speaker: OTHELLO
text: And bid me, when my fate would have me wived,

speaker: OTHELLO
text: To give it her. I did so; and take heed on ’t,

speaker: OTHELLO
text: Make it a darling like your precious eye.

speaker: OTHELLO
text: To lose ’t or give ’t away were such perdition

speaker: OTHELLO
text: As nothing else could match.

speaker: DESDEMONA
text: Is ’t possible?

speaker: OTHELLO
text: ’Tis true. There’s magic in the web of it.

speaker: OTHELLO
text: A sybil that had numbered in the world

speaker: OTHELLO
text: The sun to course two hundred compasses,

speaker: OTHELLO
text: In her prophetic fury sewed the work.

speaker: OTHELLO
text: The worms were hallowed that did breed the silk,

speaker: OTHELLO
text: And it was dyed in mummy, which the skillful

speaker: OTHELLO
text: Conserved of maidens’ hearts.

speaker: DESDEMONA
text: I’ faith, is ’t true?

speaker: OTHELLO
text: Most veritable. Therefore, look to ’t well.

speaker: DESDEMONA
text: Then would to God that I had never seen ’t!

speaker: OTHELLO
text: Ha? Wherefore?

speaker: DESDEMONA
text: Why do you speak so startingly and rash?

speaker: OTHELLO
text: Is ’t lost? Is ’t gone? Speak, is ’t out o’ th’ way?

speaker: DESDEMONA
text: Heaven bless us!

speaker: OTHELLO
text: Say you?

speaker: DESDEMONA
text: It is not lost, but what an if it were?

speaker: OTHELLO
text: How?

speaker: DESDEMONA
text: I say it is not lost.

speaker: OTHELLO
text: Fetch ’t. Let me see ’t!

speaker: DESDEMONA
text: Why, so I can. But I will not now.

speaker: DESDEMONA
text: This is a trick to put me from my suit.

speaker: DESDEMONA
text: Pray you, let Cassio be received again.

speaker: OTHELLO
text:
Fetch me the handkerchief!
                 
                Aside
                .
               My mind misgives.

speaker: DESDEMONA
text: Come, come.

speaker: DESDEMONA
text: You’ll never meet a more sufficient man.

speaker: OTHELLO
text: The handkerchief!

speaker: DESDEMONA
text: I pray, talk me of Cassio.

speaker: OTHELLO
text: The handkerchief!

speaker: DESDEMONA
text: A man that all his time

speaker: DESDEMONA
text: Hath founded his good fortunes on your love;

speaker: DESDEMONA
text: Shared dangers with you—

speaker: OTHELLO
text: The handkerchief!

speaker: DESDEMONA
text: I’ faith, you are to blame.

speaker: OTHELLO
text: Zounds!

speaker: EMILIA
text: Is not this man jealous?

speaker: DESDEMONA
text: I ne’er saw this before.

speaker: DESDEMONA
text: Sure, there’s some wonder in this handkerchief!

speaker: DESDEMONA
text: I am most unhappy in the loss of it.

speaker: EMILIA
text: ’Tis not a year or two shows us a man.

speaker: EMILIA
text: They are all but stomachs, and we all but food;

speaker: EMILIA
text: They eat us hungerly, and when they are full

speaker: EMILIA
text: They belch us.

speaker: EMILIA
text: Look you—Cassio and my husband.

speaker: IAGO
text: There is no other way; ’tis she must do ’t,

speaker: IAGO
text: And, lo, the happiness! Go and importune her.

speaker: DESDEMONA
text: How now, good Cassio, what’s the news with you?

speaker: CASSIO
text: Madam, my former suit. I do beseech you

speaker: CASSIO
text: That by your virtuous means I may again

speaker: CASSIO
text: Exist, and be a member of his love

speaker: CASSIO
text: Whom I with all the office of my heart

speaker: CASSIO
text: Entirely honor. I would not be delayed.

speaker: CASSIO
text: If my offense be of such mortal kind

speaker: CASSIO
text: That nor my service past nor present sorrows

speaker: CASSIO
text: Nor purposed merit in futurity

speaker: CASSIO
text: Can ransom me into his love again,

speaker: CASSIO
text: But to know so must be my benefit.

speaker: CASSIO
text: So shall I clothe me in a forced content,

speaker: CASSIO
text: And shut myself up in some other course

speaker: CASSIO
text: To fortune’s alms.

speaker: DESDEMONA
text: Alas, thrice-gentle Cassio,

speaker: DESDEMONA
text: My advocation is not now in tune.

speaker: DESDEMONA
text: My lord is not my lord; nor should I know him

speaker: DESDEMONA
text: Were he in favor as in humor altered.

speaker: DESDEMONA
text: So help me every spirit sanctified

speaker: DESDEMONA
text: As I have spoken for you all my best,

speaker: DESDEMONA
text: And stood within the blank of his displeasure

speaker: DESDEMONA
text: For my free speech! You must awhile be patient.

speaker: DESDEMONA
text: What I can do I will; and more I will

speaker: DESDEMONA
text: Than for myself I dare. Let that suffice you.

speaker: IAGO
text: Is my lord angry?

speaker: EMILIA
text: He went hence but now,

speaker: EMILIA
text: And certainly in strange unquietness.

speaker: IAGO
text: Can he be angry? I have seen the cannon

speaker: IAGO
text: When it hath blown his ranks into the air

speaker: IAGO
text: And, like the devil, from his very arm

speaker: IAGO
text: Puffed his own brother—and is he angry?

speaker: IAGO
text: Something of moment then. I will go meet him.

speaker: IAGO
text: There’s matter in ’t indeed if he be angry.

speaker: DESDEMONA
text: I prithee do so.

speaker: DESDEMONA
text: Something, sure, of state,

speaker: DESDEMONA
text: Either from Venice, or some unhatched practice

speaker: DESDEMONA
text: Made demonstrable here in Cyprus to him,

speaker: DESDEMONA
text: Hath puddled his clear spirit; and in such cases

speaker: DESDEMONA
text: Men’s natures wrangle with inferior things,

speaker: DESDEMONA
text: Though great ones are their object. ’Tis even so.

speaker: DESDEMONA
text: For let our finger ache, and it endues

speaker: DESDEMONA
text: Our other healthful members even to a sense

speaker: DESDEMONA
text: Of pain. Nay, we must think men are not gods,

speaker: DESDEMONA
text: Nor of them look for such observancy

speaker: DESDEMONA
text: As fits the bridal. Beshrew me much, Emilia,

speaker: DESDEMONA
text: I was—unhandsome warrior as I am!—

speaker: DESDEMONA
text: Arraigning his unkindness with my soul.

speaker: DESDEMONA
text: But now I find I had suborned the witness,

speaker: DESDEMONA
text: And he’s indicted falsely.

speaker: EMILIA
text: Pray heaven it be

speaker: EMILIA
text: State matters, as you think, and no conception

speaker: EMILIA
text: Nor no jealous toy concerning you.

speaker: DESDEMONA
text: Alas the day, I never gave him cause!

speaker: EMILIA
text: But jealous souls will not be answered so.

speaker: EMILIA
text: They are not ever jealous for the cause,

speaker: EMILIA
text: But jealous for they’re jealous. It is a monster

speaker: EMILIA
text: Begot upon itself, born on itself.

speaker: DESDEMONA
text: Heaven keep that monster from Othello’s mind!

speaker: EMILIA
text: Lady, amen.

speaker: DESDEMONA
text: I will go seek him.—Cassio, walk hereabout.

speaker: DESDEMONA
text: If I do find him fit, I’ll move your suit

speaker: DESDEMONA
text: And seek to effect it to my uttermost.

speaker: CASSIO
text: I humbly thank your Ladyship.

speaker: BIANCA
text: ’Save you, friend Cassio!

speaker: CASSIO
text: What make you from home?

speaker: CASSIO
text: How is ’t with you, my most fair Bianca?

speaker: CASSIO
text: I’ faith, sweet love, I was coming to your house.

speaker: BIANCA
text: And I was going to your lodging, Cassio.

speaker: BIANCA
text: What, keep a week away? Seven days and nights,

speaker: BIANCA
text: Eightscore eight hours, and lovers’ absent hours

speaker: BIANCA
text: More tedious than the dial eightscore times?

speaker: BIANCA
text: O weary reck’ning!

speaker: CASSIO
text: Pardon me, Bianca.

speaker: CASSIO
text: I have this while with leaden thoughts been pressed,

speaker: CASSIO
text: But I shall in a more continuate time

speaker: CASSIO
text: Strike off this score of absence. Sweet Bianca,

speaker: CASSIO
text: Take me this work out.

speaker: BIANCA
text: O, Cassio, whence came this?

speaker: BIANCA
text: This is some token from a newer friend.

speaker: BIANCA
text: To the felt absence now I feel a cause.

speaker: BIANCA
text: Is ’t come to this? Well, well.

speaker: CASSIO
text: Go to, woman!

speaker: CASSIO
text: Throw your vile guesses in the devil’s teeth,

speaker: CASSIO
text: From whence you have them. You are jealous now

speaker: CASSIO
text: That this is from some mistress, some remembrance.

speaker: CASSIO
text: No, by my faith, Bianca.

speaker: BIANCA
text: Why, whose is it?

speaker: CASSIO
text: I know not neither. I found it in my chamber.

speaker: CASSIO
text: I like the work well. Ere it be demanded,

speaker: CASSIO
text: As like enough it will, I would have it copied.

speaker: CASSIO
text: Take it, and do ’t, and leave me for this time.

speaker: BIANCA
text: Leave you? Wherefore?

speaker: CASSIO
text: I do attend here on the General,

speaker: CASSIO
text: And think it no addition, nor my wish,

speaker: CASSIO
text: To have him see me womaned.

speaker: BIANCA
text: Why, I pray you?

speaker: CASSIO
text: Not that I love you not.

speaker: BIANCA
text: But that you do not love me!

speaker: BIANCA
text: I pray you bring me on the way a little,

speaker: BIANCA
text: And say if I shall see you soon at night.

speaker: CASSIO
text: ’Tis but a little way that I can bring you,

speaker: CASSIO
text: For I attend here. But I’ll see you soon.

speaker: BIANCA
text: ’Tis very good. I must be circumstanced.
